metadata.summary: The sphinx theme for the SunPy website and documentation.

documentation:
# SunPy Project Sphinx Theme

[![PyPI version](https://badge.fury.io/py/sunpy-sphinx-theme.svg)](https://badge.fury.io/py/sunpy-sphinx-theme)

This repository contains the sphinx theme used by The Sunpy Project for all online resources.

This theme is a derivative of the excellent [pydata-sphinx-theme](https://pydata-sphinx-theme.readthedocs.io/en/stable/index.html), customized to present a uniform navigation over all the projects.

For more information see the [documentation](https://docs.sunpy.org/projects/sunpy-sphinx-theme/latest/).

modules.name: sunpy_sphinx_theme.cards
documentation: This provides a card extension for the website.

documentation: Prepare the card node for rendering.

functions.name: sunpy_sphinx_theme.cards.depart_card_node
documentation: Finalize the card node after rendering.

classes.name: sunpy_sphinx_theme.cards.Card
documentation: A custom directive for a card.

functions.name: sunpy_sphinx_theme.get_html_theme_path
documentation: Return list of HTML theme paths.

functions.name: sunpy_sphinx_theme.update_config
documentation: Update config with new default values and handle deprecated keys.

functions.name: sunpy_sphinx_theme.sst_pathto
documentation:
This is a modified version of the built-in `pathto()` function.

The default version when called with one argument returns the URL to a
sphinx document, when specified with a 1 as the second argument it returns
the path to a file relative to the root of the generated output.

This version has 4 modes:
\* `sst_pathto(document)` - The same as `pathto(document)`
\* `sst_pathto(document, 1)` - The same as `pathto(document, 1)`
\* `sst_pathto(document, 2)` - A URL relative to `sst_site_root` will be returned when `sst_is_root` is `False` and the equivalent of specifying 1 as the second argument when it is `True`.
\* `sst_pathto(document, 3)` - Do nothing return `document` unmodified.

functions.name: sunpy_sphinx_theme.update_html_context
documentation: Set extra things to use in jinja templates.
